---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="projects-header">
  <div class="warm-divider"></div>
  <h1>Projects</h1>
  <p style="color:#6b4c35; font-style:italic; font-size:1.05rem; margin-bottom:2rem;">
    A collection of data science work from coursework and beyond.
  </p>
</div>

<div style="max-width:860px; margin:0 auto;">

  <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.6rem; 
              color:#2c2118; margin-bottom:1.2rem;">
    Class Projects
  </h2>

  <div class="project-card" 
       onclick="window.open('projects/sql-analysis/Project_2_Template (2).html', '_blank')" 
       style="cursor:pointer;">
    <h3>Project 2 — SQL Data Analysis</h3>
    <span class="project-tag">SQL</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Data Wrangling</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Team Project</span>
    <p>
      A collaborative SQL analysis exploring global health spending patterns 
      using relational database queries, joins, and aggregations.
    </p>
    <span class="btn-project">▶ View Project</span>
  </div>

</div>
```
